channel.title: Security Alerts on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Security Alerts on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Upcoming cloud data retention policy for closed security alerts
item.description:
GitHub will begin enforcing a cloud data retention policy for closed Dependabot security alerts on August 25, 2026. The post says this provides a defined retention period for alert data, but it does not include the exact duration in the excerpt provided.

  • Source: GitHub
